title: codereview: Kconfig addition for CCA
description: First codereview pass after Kconfig chunk: 1. Default=y for CCA_ENABLE may break existing configs without radio CAD support (LR1110 vs sim). 2. Missing select for LICHEN_LORA_CCA in LICHEN_LORA_L2. 3. Help text mentions link layer but no changes there yet. 4. Range for timeout should consider radio-specific CAD times (project-LICHEN-da2q.15.7).
